metadata.description: Ops Hub: a duplicatable Notion operations hub plus the skills that stand it up and run it.

plugins.name: ops-hub
plugins.description: Sets up and operates a client-centric Notion operations hub (clients, projects, tasks, pipeline, and living client/project context pages). Manifest-driven skills read a Notion-resident semantic store plus live introspection before acting. Includes /hub-configure (the setup conductor), create/update skill pairs per object, and a scheduled lifetime-value sync.
